summary: Completed frontend testing of Precision Craft design system on mobile service/maintenance pages. All 22 test requirements passed. Mobile pages show dark navy theme with orange accents, Montserrat font, 4px border-radius. Desktop shows original ApplianceRepairPageNew layout unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: MobileServiceLanding.js correctly ignores emoji icon field and only renders text labels
useIsMobile hook breakpoint at 768px correctly switches between mobile/desktop templates
Design tokens properly centralized in constants (C object for colors, F for font)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Precision Craft design system fully implemented on mobile. All service repair pages (/refrigerator-repair, /washer-repair, /dishwasher-repair, /dryer-repair, /oven-repair, etc.) and maintenance pages (/maintenance/refrigerator) use MobileServiceLanding template on mobile. Desktop uses ApplianceRepairPageNew template (unchanged).

hero_dark_navy_bg.details: Mobile hero has #0D1B2A (rgb(13, 27, 42)) dark navy background

hero_h1_text.details: H1 shows 'Expert Refrigerator Repair in SF. Today.' on mobile

hero_60_block.details: $60 block with orange accent and 'Applied to repair if proceeding' text visible

hero_book_button.details: BOOK SERVICE ONLINE button orange (#FF5722), full width (350px)

hero_call_button.details: CALL button transparent bg with white border

hero_text_link.details: 'Text us for fastest scheduling' link visible below buttons

hero_trust_badges.details: '4.9 Google Rating' and 'Licensed & Insured' pills visible

common_issues_text_only.details: All 6 issue pills are text-only (NO emoji)

common_issues_left_border.details: Issue pills have 3px solid orange (#FF5722) left border

brands_4col_grid.details: WE SERVICE has 4-column brand logo grid

how_it_works_orange_numbers.details: 4 steps with orange circle numbers and left orange border

reviews_dark_cards.details: Reviews have dark cards (#1A2F45), orange stars, italic text, uppercase names

pricing_60_card.details: $60 card with 2px solid orange border, 'NO HIDDEN FEES' label, checkmark list

pricing_secondary_cards.details: 180-Day Warranty and No Hidden Fees secondary cards visible

faq_tap_targets.details: FAQ questions have min-height 52px (actual: 58px), '+' icon in orange

final_cta_orange_border.details: Final CTA has 3px solid orange top border

final_cta_headline.details: 'Get Your Refrigerator Running Like New' headline correct

sticky_bar_visible.details: Call/Book/Text sticky bar visible at bottom on mobile

desktop_unchanged.details: Desktop (1920px) shows ApplianceRepairPageNew layout with 2-column hero, light background

maintenance_service_text.details: Maintenance $60 block says 'Applied to service if proceeding' (not 'repair')

washer_repair_mobile.details: /washer-repair on mobile shows dark navy Precision Craft design

dishwasher_repair_mobile.details: /dishwasher-repair on mobile shows Precision Craft with 'DISHWASHER REPAIR' breadcrumb

4px_border_radius.details: BOOK button and all cards have 4px border-radius
